title: German Crispy Russian Toast
description: A simple yet delicious German-inspired breakfast dish featuring crispy toast topped with a rich Russian-style spread.
instructions: Cut the bread into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the bread cubes with 2 tablespoons of butter and toss until coated.
Sprinkle the crispy breadcrumbs over the bread cubes and toss until evenly distributed.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the bread is baking, prepare the Russian-style spread by whisking together the eggs, milk, and salt.
Once the bread is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Transfer the bread to a serving dish and top with the Russian-style spread.
